title: Nuclei Isolation from Human Frozen Liver
author: Sanjay Subramanian
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bhpej5je

steps.title: Thaw small tissue sample from frozen...
steps.instruction: Thaw small tissue sample from frozen preservation medium at room temperature and wash in 1x PBS

steps.title: Briefly mince tissue into small chunks...
steps.instruction: Briefly mince tissue into small chunks using a scalpel and/or razor in petri dish on ice

steps.title: Homogenize chunks using Tissue Grinder Dounce...
steps.instruction: Homogenize chunks using Tissue Grinder Dounce with Pestle A in 500μL to 1mL of ice-cold TST buffer 1 mL, TST buffer 1mL Tissue Grinder Dounce comes with two pestles with varying clearance. Pestle "A" is best suited for this protocol Ensure thorough homogenization, even after solution seems sufficiently aqueous. Quality of fixation depends on achieving full dissociation of cellular membranes

steps.title: Filter suspension through a 70μM cell...
steps.instruction: Filter suspension through a 70μM cell strainer and bring total volume up to 5mL with ice-cold ST buffer with 0.1% PFA. Ensure solution is mixed well to circulate fix 5 mL, ST buffer with 0.1% PFA

steps.title: Centrifuge nuclei at 500g for 5min...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge nuclei at 500g for 5min at 4 °C 00:05:00, centrifuge 500g at 4 °C

steps.title: Remove supernatant and resuspend in 5...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and resuspend in 5 mL ST buffer 5 mL, ST buffer

steps.title: Repeat steps 5-6 Final resuspension volume...
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 5-6 Final resuspension volume may be greater or less than stated and should be judged accordingly based on pellet size

steps.title: Filter solution through a 40μM cell strainer
steps.instruction: Filter solution through a 40μM cell strainer

steps.title: Analyze nuclei morphology using hemocytometer and Trypan blue
steps.instruction: Analyze nuclei morphology using hemocytometer and Trypan blue

steps.title: Adjust nuclei concentration as needed (700-1200...
steps.instruction: Adjust nuclei concentration as needed (700-1200 cells/μL for 10x Chromium system) 1000 nuclei/μL
